understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by placing all selectable pieces onto goal tiles simultaneously. Each level has a step budget, and once every goal is occupied, the level is won and the game progresses to the next one.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player controls one selectable piece at a time, identified by its position. Movement attempts to shift the selected piece one step in the chosen direction; if a pushable block is adjacent, it may be pushed along with the piece. Walls block movement, but their exact behavior must be discovered through interaction. The CLICK action switches control to another selectable piece at the specified pixel coordinates. The semantic grid provides a symbolic overview, while object positions and movement heuristics help plan actions.
